title: Bridge Essay: My avatar moves with me, so I am the one acting: Avatar responsiveness supports

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Agency as inference — the 'I' as nested prediction error minimization, not homunculus.

**My avatar moves with me, so Iam the one acting: Avatar responsiveness supports implicit sense of agency in virtual reality.**. PloS one.. PMID: 42330024. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0351839. Virtual reality (VR) allows users to interact with computer-generated environments in acontrolled yet immersive manner. One of its most relevant features is its ability to induce virtual embodiment, the process of becoming rooted in avirtual body. Akey component of this experience is the sense of agency over the action-outcomes produced in the virtual environment.
